response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack and web developer with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but fundamentally lacks the core requirements for this role. He has less than a year of professional C++ experience from nearly a decade ago, no demonstrated Windows platform C++ development, and falls short of the mandatory 5-10 years of capital markets or fixed income domain expertise.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience with strong CI/CD and DevOps skills.
Some exposure to the financial technology sector through RIDE Capital.
Demonstrated versatility across multiple programming languages and modern architectural patterns.
concerns: Severely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ experience, with only 6 months recorded in 2014-2015.
No demonstrated experience with Windows-based C++ development or core fixed income domains.
Technical expertise is heavily skewed towards web development (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than backend financial systems.
